title: Wave Verdict
description: Structured output schema for the wave-end verification chain (build-guardian / wave verifier). Consumed by phase-7a-epic to decide whether to cascade to the next wave or trigger failure handling.

epicId.title: Epic ID
epicId.description: The epic bead identifier this wave belongs to.

waveNumber.title: Wave Number
waveNumber.description: 1-indexed wave number within the epic run.

verdict.title: Verdict
verdict.description: The wave-end verification result. 'pass' means build-guardian is green and the wave is safe to cascade. 'fail' means build-guardian or a verification step failed. 'escalate' means failures exceeded retry limits and require human intervention.

buildStatus.title: Build Status
buildStatus.description: Output of the build-guardian step. 'green' means lint, tests, and build all passed. 'red' means one or more steps failed.

beadsCompleted.title: Beads Completed
beadsCompleted.description: Bead IDs that were successfully closed in this wave.

beadsFailed.title: Beads Failed
beadsFailed.description: Bead IDs that failed or were escalated in this wave.

concerns.title: Concerns
concerns.description: List of issues identified during wave-end verification. Empty array when verdict is 'pass'.

nextWaveReady.title: Next Wave Ready
nextWaveReady.description: Bead IDs that became unblocked by this wave's completion and are candidates for the next wave.
